who: HR teams in small to medium-sized marketing agencies managing 5-15 employees
offer: For HR teams in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5-15 employees, inefficient scheduling causes missed deadlines. We streamline scheduling instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem: Inefficient workforce scheduling and time-off management
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR teams seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about scheduling tools
Direct message outreach to HR teams with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try simple time-off request form and visual scheduling calendar on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and call-to-action
Produce a demo video showcasing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
